title: Fertility concern documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Specifies focused female examination including vital signs, BMI, thyroid and pelvic assessment and a clinically selected evaluation including semen, ovulation, tubal, and uterine assessment.
examination.rationale: Supports clinician-selected examination and test review.
examination.evidence_extract: Specifies focused female examination including vital signs, BMI, thyroid and pelvic assessment and a clinically selected evaluation including semen, ovulation, tubal, and uterine assessment.

source.title: Guideline for the prevention, diagnosis and treatment of infertility

exact_section.heading: Chapter 3.3 — focused examination and diagnostic evaluation

investigations.text: Supports concurrent female and male evaluation, duration trying to conceive, menstrual, obstetric, gynaecologic, medical, surgical, medication, lifestyle, sexual, STI, partner, and prior-investigation history.
investigations.rationale: Supports entered individual and partner history.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports concurrent female and male evaluation, duration trying to conceive, menstrual, obstetric, gynaecologic, medical, surgical, medication, lifestyle, sexual, STI, partner, and prior-investigation history.

source.title: Guideline for the prevention, diagnosis and treatment of infertility

exact_section.heading: Chapter 3.1–3.3 — objective, indication, initial consultation, and medical history

investigations.text: Defines female, male, and unexplained-factor evaluation, menstrual-pattern context, ovulation confirmation, reproductive hormones, semen analysis, tubal assessment, and uterine-cavity assessment.
investigations.rationale: Supports diagnostic context without generating tests or conclusions.
investigations.evidence_extract: Defines female, male, and unexplained-factor evaluation, menstrual-pattern context, ovulation confirmation, reproductive hormones, semen analysis, tubal assessment, and uterine-cavity assessment.

source.title: Guideline for the prevention, diagnosis and treatment of infertility

exact_section.heading: Chapter 5.1–5.3 — female, male, and unexplained infertility diagnostic pathways

assessment.text: Requires preference-sensitive discussion, psychosocial support, transparent information, and consent-based collaborative decisions.
assessment.evidence_extract: Requires preference-sensitive discussion, psychosocial support, transparent information, and consent-based collaborative decisions.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Duration, age, partner context, cycles, pregnancy history, intercourse, medicines, examination and tests are absent.
No infertility diagnosis, cause, test panel, treatment or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
